value: Eternal Pass is a monthly service that increases your number of daily stage attempts and includes gift items.

-Your subscription is applied to the game data in use at time of purchase.
*Before purchasing a subscription on a device that you are not currently playing on, link your game data and log in to the account to which you want the subscription to apply.
- Purchasing multiple subscriptions and using Link Data will not result in duplicate perks being applied from each subscription.
